added: Priority Policy: FIRST ntl-workflow-guidance → SECOND gee-routing → LAST Knowledge_Base

task_executed: Q24 - Fuding City Daily NTL Change Animation (2020-01-01 to 2020-01-07)
description: Added new workflow Q24 for generating daily NTL change animation with unified rendering and Chinese annotations. Workflow includes Data_Searcher retrieval (VNP46A2 daily, 7 days) and Code_Assistant execution (PNG frame rendering + GIF synthesis).
change_reason: User requirement: Generate high-quality GIF animation showing daily NTL changes for Fuding City with unified brightness range, custom colormap, and complete Chinese annotations (location, date, legend, north arrow, scale bar). Existing workflows did not cover daily NTL animation generation with cartographic elements.

added: Q24: Generate daily NTL change animation for Fuding City (2020-01-01 to 2020-01-07)
Two-step workflow: Data_Searcher retrieval + Code_Assistant execution
Technical notes: VNP46A2 dataset, 500m resolution, unified brightness range [0.0, 113.228]
Chinese font support: SimHei/Microsoft YaHei configuration
Path resolution: relative paths (inputs/outputs) for sandbox compatibility
Execution example with issues resolved (path resolution, Chinese character display)

artifact_audit.notes: All 8 output files successfully generated with correct structure: 7 HD PNG frames (1920x1080 @ 150 DPI) with Chinese annotations, 1 infinite-loop GIF (800ms/frame). Chinese characters display correctly with SimHei/Microsoft YaHei fonts.

validation_notes: Q24 workflow successfully executed: Data_Searcher retrieved 7-day VNP46A2 data (complete coverage), Code_Assistant generated 7 PNG frames + 1 GIF with unified rendering (brightness range [0.0, 113.228], custom NTL colormap), Chinese annotations display correctly (SimHei/Microsoft YaHei), path resolution issues resolved (relative paths). All cartographic elements present: location title, date label, radiance colorbar, north arrow, scale bar, data source credit.

task_executed: Q20 - Myanmar 2025 Earthquake NTL Impact Assessment + Visualization
description: Validated Q20 workflow execution with full compliance + 4-panel dashboard visualization extension. Documented correct VNP46A2 band name (DNB_BRDF_Corrected_NTL) for future reference.

artifact_audit.notes: All Q20 required outputs plus visualization charts generated successfully. 4-panel dashboard and comparison bar chart display correct data and professional styling.

validation_notes: Q20 workflow validated again: multi-scale buffers (25/50/100km) correctly implemented, first-night rule applied (event 12:50 local > overpass 01:30 → first_night=2025-03-29), all outputs generated (CSV+JSON+PNG charts). 25km epicenter zone: SEVERE (-42.1%), 70.4% recovery. Outer zones: MILD impacts with divergent recovery. Global metrics updated: total_executions=10, overall_success_rate=0.90, avg_confidence=0.902.

description: Added new workflow pattern for country-scale multi-province NTL zonal statistics via GEE server-side reduceRegions. Key lessons: (1) Use monthly VIIRS composite .mean() fallback when annual V22 images inaccessible; (2) reduceRegions does not accept maxPixels/tileScale; (3) geoBoundaries CHN excludes Taiwan - must add explicit ee.Feature polygon.
change_reason: User requirement: Calculate 2020 NTL mean for all 34 Chinese provinces including Taiwan. No existing workflow covered country-scale GEE reduceRegions with Taiwan inclusion requirement.

added: New workflow pattern: country_scale_province_ntl_statistics (L3, GEE reduceRegions)
4 key lessons documented: monthly fallback, reduceRegions params, Taiwan polygon, country-scale strategy
Metrics entry: country_scale_province_ntl_statistics with full compliance checklist
patch_summary.workflow_count_change: statistical_analysis.json: existing Q11-Q16 workflows; new country-scale pattern added to evolution references

artifact_audit.notes: 34-province ranked CSV generated successfully. Taiwan included at rank 9 (2.41). All validation checks passed: 34 features, non-negative values, sorted descending.

validation_notes: Country-scale workflow validated: GEE server-side reduceRegions correctly used (no local raster download), monthly composite fallback produced valid 2020 data, Taiwan explicitly added as ee.Feature polygon (120-122E, 22-25.5N). Required 3 script iterations (v1-v3) to resolve dataset, parameter, and boundary issues. Final output: 34 provinces ranked by 2020 ANTL.
